nodes.title: Quantum Chemistry 2048
nodes.summary: Start page for the interactive schoolbook and its live learning graph.

nodes.summary: An iPad-friendly tile game where merges reveal concepts from wavefunctions to molecular orbitals.

nodes.summary: Explains how paper QR codes point to living pages that can evolve after the book ships.

nodes.summary: Local-first instrumentation for measuring curiosity paths without collecting personal data by default.

nodes.title: Infinite Cache Engine
nodes.summary: A seeded content graph that records unknowns, queues refreshes, and keeps exploration paths available offline.
